description:
Module-qualified call resolution at run time — same flattened-name lookup as the JIT (resolve.rs produces fully-qualified names; interp reads them).

## Acceptance

- `# paths: jit, interp` on modules.fz, alias.fz, nested_modules.fz, import.fz, attributes.fz.
title: ir_interp_v2: modules + import + alias
